name: flighttracker-workflows
description: Search and compare creative flight combinations for the lowest practical total cost.

interface.shortDescription: Find the cheapest practical flight combinations.
interface.longDescription: Compares cash and award fares, flexible dates, nearby airports, separate one-ways, mixed carriers, positioning flights, open jaws, and self-transfers using true all-in trip cost.
defaultPrompt: Find the cheapest practical flights for my trip.
Compare round trip versus separate one-way flights.
Search flexible dates and nearby airports for savings.
